content.rendered:
There are many materials available online for the active student to utilize. Below, you can find more information about what Finnish language learning books are available.

Finnish Course Books

LANGUAGE LEVELS

  • Beginner Finnish – A1.1 to A1.3
    • What is level A1?
  • Advanced Beginner – A2.1 to A2.2
    • What is level A2?
  • Intermediate Finnish – B1.1 to B1.2
    • YKI-testi – When are you ready? B1.1
    • B1.1 grammar for YKI-testi
    • Important words for YKI-testi instructions

 

  • Currently not covered yet on Uusi kielemme
    • Upper Intermediate Finnish – B2.1 to B2.2
    • Advanced Finnish – C1.1 to C1.2
    • Proficient Finnish – C2.1 to C2.2
  • Check list for determing your level
    • Coming soon!

excerpt.rendered: There are many materials available online for the active student to utilize. Below, you can find more information about what Finnish language learning books are available.
